tasks.label: Install Git
tasks.command: winget install --id Git.Git -e --source winget --accept-source-agreements --accept-package-agreements

tasks.label: Check Git
tasks.command: where.exe git; git --version

tasks.label: Locate Git
tasks.command: $paths = @('C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe','C:\Program Files (x86)\Git\cmd\git.exe','C:\Program Files\Git\bin\git.exe'); foreach ($p in $paths) { if (Test-Path $p) { Write-Host "FOUND $p" } }

tasks.label: Initialize Git Repo
tasks.command: $git = 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; Set-Location 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal'; & $git init; & $git add .; & $git commit -m "Initial commit"

tasks.label: Commit project files
tasks.command: $git = 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; Set-Location 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal'; & $git init; & $git add .gitignore README.md start-demo.bat stop-demo.bat task1-model-api task2-portal; & $git commit -m "Initial commit"

tasks.label: Verify git commands
tasks.command: & 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe' --version; Set-Location 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal'; & 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe' status --short

tasks.label: Clean node_modules from git
tasks.command: $git = 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; Set-Location 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal'; & $git rm -r --cached task2-portal/node_modules --ignore-unmatch; & $git add .gitignore README.md start-demo.bat stop-demo.bat task1-model-api task2-portal/app task2-portal/package.json task2-portal/package-lock.json task2-portal/postcss.config.js task2-portal/tailwind.config.ts task2-portal/tsconfig.json task2-portal/next-env.d.ts task2-portal/next.config.js task2-portal/app; & $git commit -m "Add source files and docs"

tasks.label: Add remote and push
tasks.command: $git = 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; Set-Location 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal'; & $git add .gitignore README.md start-demo.bat stop-demo.bat task1-model-api task2-portal/app task2-portal/package.json task2-portal/package-lock.json task2-portal/postcss.config.js task2-portal/tailwind.config.ts task2-portal/tsconfig.json task2-portal/next-env.d.ts task2-portal/next.config.js; & $git commit -m "Add source files and docs"; & $git branch -M main; & $git remote add origin https://github.com/your-username/your-repo.git; & $git push -u origin main

tasks.label: Check git status
tasks.command: & 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe' -C 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal' status --short

tasks.label: Create GitHub repo
tasks.command: $git = 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; Set-Location 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal'; & $git add .; & $git commit -m "Add housing portal demo"; & $git branch -M main; & $git remote remove origin 2>$null; & $git remote add origin https://github.com/[REDACTED-USER]/housing-portal.git; & $git push -u origin main

tasks.label: Push to GitHub
tasks.command: $git='C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; Set-Location 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal'; & $git add .; & $git commit -m "Add housing portal demo"; & $git branch -M main; & $git remote remove origin 2>$null; & $git remote add origin 'https://github.com/[REDACTED-USER]/housing-portal.git'; & $git push -u origin main

tasks.label: Stage and commit separately
tasks.command: $git='C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; Set-Location 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal'; & $git add .; Write-Host 'staged'; & $git commit -m 'Add housing portal demo'; Write-Host 'committed'

tasks.label: Configure git identity
tasks.command: $git='C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; & $git config --global user.name '[REDACTED-USER]'; & $git config --global user.email '[REDACTED-USER]@users.noreply.github.com'; & $git config --global --list

tasks.label: Push to GitHub
tasks.command: $git='C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; Set-Location 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal'; & $git add .; & $git commit -m 'Add housing portal demo'; & $git branch -M main; & $git remote remove origin 2>$null; & $git remote add origin 'https://github.com/[REDACTED-USER]/housing-portal.git'; & $git push -u origin main

tasks.label: Run GitHub push script
tasks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal\[REMOVED]'

tasks.label: Create GitHub repo and push
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $repoPath='C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal'; $git='C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; $username='[REDACTED-USER]'; $password='[REDACTED-PASSWORD]'; $repoName='housing-portal'; $repoOwner='[REDACTED-USER]'; $repoUrl='https://github.com/[REDACTED-USER]/housing-portal.git'; Set-Location $repoPath; $auth = [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes("$username:$password")); $headers = @{ Authorization = "Basic $auth"; 'User-Agent' = 'PowerShell' }; try { $repoCheck = Invoke-RestMethod -Headers $headers -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/$repoOwner/$repoName" -Method Get } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ -ne 404) { throw } }; if (-not $repoCheck) { $body = @{ name = $repoName; private = $false } | ConvertTo-Json; Invoke-RestMethod -Headers $headers -Uri 'https://api.github.com/user/repos' -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json' | Out-Null }; & $git config user.name $username; & $git config user.email "$username@users.noreply.github.com"; & $git add .; & $git commit -m 'Add housing portal demo' 2>$null; & $git branch -M main; & $git remote remove origin 2>$null; & $git remote add origin $repoUrl; & $git remote set-url origin "https://$username:$password@github.com/$repoOwner/$repoName.git"; & $git push -u origin main

tasks.label: Create GitHub repo and push
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $repoPath='C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal'; $git='C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; $username='[REDACTED-USER]'; $password='[REDACTED-PASSWORD]'; $repoName='housing-portal'; $repoOwner='[REDACTED-USER]'; $repoUrl='https://github.com/[REDACTED-USER]/housing-portal.git'; Set-Location $repoPath; $auth = [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes("${username}:${password}")); $headers = @{ Authorization = "Basic $auth"; 'User-Agent' = 'PowerShell' }; try { $repoCheck = Invoke-RestMethod -Headers $headers -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/$repoOwner/$repoName" -Method Get } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ -ne 404) { throw } }; if (-not $repoCheck) { $body = @{ name = $repoName; private = $false } | ConvertTo-Json; Invoke-RestMethod -Headers $headers -Uri 'https://api.github.com/user/repos' -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json' | Out-Null }; & $git config user.name $username; & $git config user.email "$username@users.noreply.github.com"; & $git add .; & $git commit -m 'Add housing portal demo' 2>$null; & $git branch -M main; & $git remote remove origin 2>$null; & $git remote add origin $repoUrl; & $git remote set-url origin "https://${username}:${password}@github.com/$repoOwner/$repoName.git"; & $git push -u origin main

tasks.label: Inspect git state
tasks.command: $git='C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; Set-Location 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal'; & $git status --short; Write-Host '---'; & $git branch --show-current; Write-Host '---'; & $git log --oneline -1

tasks.label: Commit final tweaks
tasks.command: $git='C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; Set-Location 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal'; & $git add .vscode/tasks.json; & $git commit -m 'Update task config'

tasks.label: Push to GitHub
tasks.command: $git='C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; Set-Location 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal'; & $git remote remove origin 2>$null; & $git remote add origin 'https://github.com/[REDACTED-USER]/housing-portal.git'; & $git push -u origin main

tasks.label: Run GitHub push script
tasks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal\[REMOVED]'

tasks.label: Inspect Git environment
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $git = 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; & $git --version; if (Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'gh-installed' } else { Write-Host 'gh-not-found' }

tasks.label: Install GitHub CLI
tasks.command: cmd.exe /c "winget install --id GitHub.cli -e --source winget --accept-source-agreements --accept-package-agreements"

tasks.label: Verify gh CLI
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; if (Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { gh --version } else { Write-Host 'gh-not-found' }

tasks.label: Locate GitHub CLI
tasks.command: cmd.exe /c "where gh"

tasks.label: Find gh executable
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files','C:\Program Files (x86)' -Filter gh.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName"

tasks.label: Search gh executable
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files' -Filter gh.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName"

tasks.label: Search gh install
tasks.command: cmd.exe /c "dir /s /b \"C:\Users\wangy\AppData\Local\Programs\GitHub CLI\gh.exe\" 2>nul || echo not-found"

tasks.label: Find gh path
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\Program Files','C:\Program Files (x86)' -Filter gh.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 | Format-List *"

tasks.label: Check gh in PATH
tasks.command: where.exe gh

tasks.label: Find gh executable
tasks.command: cmd.exe /c "where gh"

tasks.label: Search gh executable
tasks.command: cmd.exe /c "where /r \"C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\" gh.exe 2>nul || where /r \"C:\Program Files\" gh.exe 2>nul || where /r \"C:\Program Files (x86)\" gh.exe 2>nul"

tasks.label: Check git and gh availability
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "git --version; Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.Definition } ; git remote -v"

tasks.label: Locate Git and GH
tasks.command: if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe') { Write-Output 'GIT_FOUND=C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe' } else { Write-Output 'GIT_NOT_FOUND' }; if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\bin\gh.exe') { Write-Output 'GH_FOUND=C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\bin\gh.exe' } else { Write-Output 'GH_NOT_FOUND' }; if (Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Output 'GH_ON_PATH' } else { Write-Output 'GH_NOT_ON_PATH' }

tasks.label: Inspect git repository
tasks.command: & 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe' -C 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal' status --short; & 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe' -C 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal' branch --show-current; & 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe' -C 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal' remote -v

tasks.label: Test push and locate gh path
tasks.command: $git = 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\bin\gh.exe') { Write-Output "GH_PATH=C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\bin\gh.exe"; & 'C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\bin\gh.exe' --version } else { Write-Output 'GH_MISSING' }; & $git -C 'C:\Users\wangy\Documents\housing-portal' push -u origin main

tasks.label: Test GitHub remote access
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$git='C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; Write-Output 'Testing git ls-remote'; & $git ls-remote https://github.com/[REDACTED-USER]/housing-portal.git 2>&1 | Write-Output; Write-Output 'Testing API access'; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://api.github.com/repos/[REDACTED-USER]/housing-portal' -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty StatusCode"

tasks.label: Check Git and search gh
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Write-Output 'GIT_PATH='; if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe') { Write-Output 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe' } else { Write-Output 'NOT_FOUND' }; Write-Output 'GIT_VERSION='; & 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe' --version; Write-Output 'SEARCH_GH='; Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\Program Files','C:\Program Files (x86)' -Filter gh.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.FullName }"

tasks.label: Verify gh executable and auth status
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$gh='C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe'; if (Test-Path $gh) { & $gh --version; Write-Output '---'; & $gh auth status } else { Write-Output 'GH_NOT_FOUND' }"

tasks.label: Verify gh executable path
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe') { & 'C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe' --version; Write-Output '---'; & 'C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe' auth status } else { Write-Output 'GH_NOT_FOUND' }"

tasks.label: Verify gh installed
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "& 'C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe' --version"

tasks.label: Test shell execution
tasks.command: cmd.exe /c "echo hi"

tasks.label: Check gh auth status
tasks.command: cmd.exe /c "\"C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe\" auth status 2>&1"

tasks.label: Verify gh executable again
tasks.command: cmd.exe /c "\"C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe\" --version"

tasks.label: Run gh auth login
tasks.command: & 'C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe' auth login

tasks.label: Run gh auth login web

tasks.label: Verify gh authentication
tasks.command: cmd.exe /c "\"C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe\" auth status"
